title: Would you trust AI with your trades? Our app Finnext: AI Stock Forecasts nails 80% of forecasts
author: Finnext-AI
selftext:
**Looking for more than just stock picks?**  
Finnext AI combines everything a trader needs in one app:

📊 **AI Predictions** \- over 80% success rate  
⚡ **Day Trading Ideas** \- 3 fresh setups every market day  
🎓 **Learning Journey** \- step-by-step education for beginners & intermediates  
🔥 **Active Tickers** \- see what’s moving right now  
🌅 **Sundown Digest** \- daily market recap to close out your day

👉 Start your **7-day free trial** and test it yourself. **Finnext: AI Stock Forecasts**
